overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban street dominated by a massive pink neon ferris wheel structure. The player passes a police crime scene with NCPD officers and vehicles, then enters a shanty town encampment beneath the glowing structure.

dark van with yellow biohazard symbol parked on the street

large vertical billboard with illuminated pink cat face and Japanese text
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, walking along a concrete sidewalk toward a massive pink neon ferris wheel glowing in the distance. A biohazard van and NCPD police cruiser are parked ahead near a crime scene, while a large cat billboard illuminates the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: police crime scene with yellow tape and burning building

moving past the police cordon toward the area beneath the neon structure

agents.ego_description: walking past police officers and the crime scene tape toward the large structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and cap walking in the opposite direction
police officer standing guard near the cruiser and crime scene tape

entered.detail: building with curved traditional roof and fire burning on the rooftop
yellow and black caution tape blocking off the area around the building

segments.scene_description: The player passes the police cruiser and officers standing near yellow crime scene tape. A traditional Japanese building with fire on its roof becomes visible on the right as the camera moves toward the massive neon structure, while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled area beneath the massive neon ferris wheel

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the spinning neon structure
looking up at the massive spinning neon wheel overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through debris and abandoned vehicles beneath the glowing structure

entered.detail: derelict yellow vehicle abandoned under the structure
concrete barriers and scattered trash covering the ground

segments.scene_description: Moving beneath the massive spinning neon ferris wheel, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. The ground is littered with debris and abandoned cars, while the pink neon lights cast an intense glow overhead. The street opens into a semi-covered area under the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: shanty town encampment with campfires under the ferris wheel

events.description: entering the homeless encampment with visible campfires and tents
moving deeper into the fire-lit encampment area with warmer lighting

agents.ego_description: exploring the makeshift camp with tents and fires beneath the neon structure

notable_agents.action: person sitting by the campfire in the encampment
person standing near a makeshift tent structure

entered.detail: burning fire pit with people gathered around for warmth
blue and gray tent structure with fabric walls
abandoned red upholstered armchair sitting in the dirt
yellow food cart with white umbrella and glowing red lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a shanty town encampment beneath the ferris wheel, with campfires burning and makeshift tents set up among the debris. People sit by the fires while the camera explores the area, passing abandoned furniture and a yellow vending cart. The pink neon structure is now visible to the left as the player moves deeper into the camp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile, police-guarded city street into a gritty, makeshift shanty town beneath a colossal neon landmark. It begins on a concrete sidewalk moving toward a massive pink neon ferris wheel, passing a biohazard van and a glowing cat billboard. As the camera advances, it glides past NCPD officers and yellow crime scene tape, revealing a traditional Japanese building with a burning roof on the right. The scene then shifts into a darker, more enclosed environment as the camera moves directly beneath the spinning neon structure, where the ground becomes littered with debris and abandoned cars. Finally, the space opens into a sprawling encampment of makeshift tents and campfires, passing a yellow vending cart and discarded furniture while the pink glow of the ferris wheel looms to the left.
